# hindclaw Provider

Manage Hindsight memory banks and Hindclaw access control.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for authentication. May also be provided via HINDCLAW_API_KEY.
- `api_url` (String) Hindsight API server URL. May also be provided via HINDCLAW_API_URL.
